channel.title: DeHub Community Blog
channel.description: Stay updated with the latest news, insights, and stories from the DeHub ecosystem

item.title: Strategic Shift: Discontinuing Ethereum Mainnet Support for DHB
item.description: DHB is moving to Base L2 for better performance, lower costs, and alignment with Ethereum's Layer 2-centric future. Learn about our strategic pivot and what it means for the ecosystem.
item.dc:creator: DeHub Team

item.title: Off-Ramp Service Revealed: DeHub Card Coming Soon
item.description: Introducing the DeHub Card - our upcoming premium payment solution that bridges crypto and traditional finance with style and functionality.
item.dc:creator: DeHub Team

item.title: DeHub Flagship Game Launch Partner Airdrop
item.description: Last Chad Standing game launch with partner airdrop details. Check your allocations and get ready for the ultimate gaming experience.
item.dc:creator: DeHub Team

item.title: Leading the Way: DeHub Founder's Official TikTok Partner Agency Becomes UK #1 with 1,000 Streamers
item.description: Team First Class Agency, co-founded by DeHub's Mike Hales and Indi Jay Cammish, becomes the UK's #1 TikTok agency with over 1,000 active live streamers.
item.dc:creator: DeHub Team

item.title: Tokenised Uploads: Seamless Content Sharing with Smart Contract Integration
item.description: Discover how DeHub's tokenised upload system revolutionizes content sharing with blockchain technology and smart contract integration.
item.dc:creator: DeHub Team
